description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named gcc that runs on push to master and development branches and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy to run two jobs, build-gcc-linux and build-gcc-linux-no-stl, on ubuntu-18.04 and ubuntu-20.04. For each job, check out the code, build with cmake and gcc, and run tests with ./test/etl_tests. The build-gcc-linux job builds with STL support, while the build-gcc-linux-no-stl job builds without STL support.
